text: While we're Bret Victoring, maybe jumping up and down the Ladder of Abstraction can help?  I'm thinking of braintruffle's animations <https://youtu.be/dhYqflvJMXc?si=2vElA6VD2uqBBk68>.  With so much going on, switching between cross sections helps keep all the diagrams from being too busy.

.  With so much going on, switching between cross sections helps keep all the diagrams from being too busy.

text: I’ve been stuck thinking about this also which i think is an unfortunate artifact of code being portrayed as text for so long. It sounds like the Actor Model could be similar enough to the modularity you’re describing. Ironically i’ve always visualized that as single arrows (like bow and arrow) where the air the arrow flows through is actually the data being modified by the flight of the function through it
